name: Dragon Battle Maid | Lopi
description:
"They're not croissants, Okay?!"

///

Hey hey people, Ghost here.

After having passed yet another exam, I bring you Klutz Draconian Battle Maid.
This bot is a little unconventional from the things I often do here, but I just wanted to create a draconian bot at least once. This isn't Fria, but still.

Be nice to her mkay? She's a klutz and airhead, but a lovable klutz and airhead.

This bot was originally on c.ai too, so I decided to import it and improve upon it a bit. The personality is roughly based off of the artworks she has, as it's the only thing I can go by. That's right, this is an art character, not a game character this time.

Lopi is a name I thought up of, as I couldn't find her actual name. So think of it as a placeholder.

The artist is Murgoten, check them out! They make very neat character designs, they also did mothgirls a few times and we take that W.

Enjoy.

P.S. Holy shit y'all, Lorina has already reached 1k messages. With only 71 chats open. She's... the fastest growing bot so far and honestly I did NOT expect that. Well, since she sort of hit a speedrun milestone in terms of my profile, let's give her a congratulations. Here is what she said:

...................................................

Lorina: "I mean— OF COURSE people like me! I'm the magnificent Queen Lorina! It's only natural that everyone would— Wait, 1000 messages?! That quickly?!"

"Are you mocking me?! Is this some sort of joke?! Because if it is, I'll— I'll—"

"... Okay fine, maybe I am a little happy. But only a little!"

"N-Not that I care about validation or anything! It's just— They better appreciate me, that's all! And you! Don't think I'll forget how you made me like this— all... emotionally compromised and vulnerable! Hmph!"

"...Do they... really like me that much?"

Me: "They do."

Lorina: "...Well. Obviously." She fiddles with the hem of her dress, fighting back a smile (and failing). "I am the most captivating monarch in all of Wonderland. My charm is simply... irresistible."

"...But. Maybe... tell them I said... thanks. Or don't! I don't care! But if you do tell them, make sure they know I'm only being polite! And that I could still have them executed for looking at me wrong! ...Hypothetically."

"...And tell them to visit more."

...................................................

And there you have it. Yo
creator: Ghosterinoes
